query: Replace any in this API helper with a truthful type without changing runtime behavior.
Remove explicit any from our shared DTO and application helpers; keep behavior the same.
A reviewer flagged unsafe any usage in this service layer — narrow it safely.
Replace Record<string, any> in this payload type with something more precise.
Add runtime validation for this untrusted JSON webhook input and derive the TypeScript type from the schema.
Enable stricter tsconfig flags and harden compiler options across the monorepo.
Write type-level regression tests for inference and assignability after the type surface is truthful.
tsc reports a cascade of errors after a library upgrade; triage the root cause.
